en-US.title: Finch: AI Investing
en-US.subtitle: Your AI research desk
en-US.description:
Finch is your AI-powered investment research assistant. Ask anything about the markets in plain English and get clear, sourced answers — then go deeper with full stock research, your portfolio, and watchlists, all in one place.

WHAT YOU CAN DO

• Chat with an AI research desk — ask about any company, compare fundamentals, summarize earnings, or break down what moved a stock today.

• Live markets — top gainers, losers, and most active names, major index movers, and the latest market news, for both US and India.

• Deep stock research — quotes and key stats, 52-week range, analyst ratings and price targets, full financial statements (income, balance sheet, cash flow, ratios), earnings history, peers, and news.

• Track your portfolio — securely connect your brokerage (Robinhood, Schwab, Fidelity, E*TRADE and more) to see holdings, balances, and performance in one view.

• Watchlists — follow the tickers you care about with live prices and sparklines.

• Earnings calendar — never miss an upcoming report.

Finch is for research and information only and does not provide financial advice.
en-US.promoText: Ask anything about stocks, markets, and your portfolio — Finch's AI research desk has the answer, with the data to back it up.
